title: Podcast Setup
html:
August 2020 podcast-launch brainstorm by 17-year-old Yahir: 5-man-max setup with 3-man lead, gear list (tripod, video camera, 2 microphones, TV, editing software), "Monster as staple of show" branding, and topic seeds "Horny Teens" and "Future of friends."

TL;DR

  • Senior-year-of-high-school Yahir mapping out a multi-host podcast format with an energy-drink branding angle.
  • Topic list reads like teen-irreverent — early hint of the same casting-call energy that later powers Brotein / irl lore.
  • One of several never-launched media projects in the 2020 apple notes junk drawer-style note batch.

yahir gonzalez · brotein · irl lore · covid pandemic era · corvallis or
